raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1126 will ensure that nearly every working Californian has access to a workplace retirement savings program.",
    "SB 1126 is estimated to expand access to CalSavers to approximately three quarters of a million California workers.",
    "SB 1168 raises the minimum statutory CalPERS postretirement benefit for local public agency employees from $500 to $2,000.",
    "The original $300 lump sum postretirement death benefit for all CalPERS annuitants in 1945 would be $4,699 in 2022 when adjusted for inflation.",
    "The current CalPERS postretirement death benefit amount for most public employees is far below the actual cost of a funeral."
  ]
}
```
